description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a slender, upright form, but the details are extremely minimal and nearly imperceptible. The figure appears as a faint, elongated silhouette with no discernible facial features, clothing details, or limb articulation. The overall shape is linear and thin, suggesting a human form in a neutral, upright stance. There are no visible accessories, carried items, or distinguishing marks. The surface appears smooth and featureless, with no visible texture or color variation. The object is highly abstracted, lacking any realistic anatomical or clothing details.
description: A faint, slender, upright adult human figure with minimal detail and a smooth, featureless surface.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from the side, appearing as a thin, nearly invisible vertical line.
description_view_1: The figure is viewed from an angle, still extremely thin and faint, with no additional detail visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, again showing a barely perceptible, linear silhouette.
description_view_3: Another angled view, maintaining the same minimal, indistinct outline as other perspectives.
